description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.2.2 Docker image as the default image. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs `apt-get update`, `apt-get install -qy nodejs npm`, `curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_10.x | bash -`, `apt-get install -qy nodejs`, `ln -s \"$(which nodejs)\" /usr/local/bin/node`, `npm install`, and `npm test`. In the deploy stage add a staging job that runs only on the master branch, uses the ruby:2.2.2 image, executes `gem install dpl` and `dpl --provider=heroku --app=intense-mountain-79221 --api-key=e2fbb215-565e-4274-8f2b-73f7670afa9f` to deploy to Heroku.
